hero.title: Luna
hero.desc: A massive, integrated fantasy world with over 200 characters. Built on Discord as a complete community for roleplay and storytelling.

overview.title: Your Journey Begins
overview.subtitle: Choose your path and discover the secrets of Luna.

showcase.storyDesc: This is where "The Great Chaos War" begins. Discover the history of the crescent island, how its knights fell before the "King of Chaos," and how hope was restored by the "Two Masterminds." An epic tale spanning hundreds of years.
showcase.gameDesc: An innovative strategic card system. Collect, compete, and conquer with your wit. Each player holds 5 cards, and the secret lies in timing and choosing the right tier (Common, Rare, Epic, Legendary).
showcase.charsDesc: Over 200 unique characters. From "The Mastermind" who pulls the strings, to the guardians and knights. Meet the main characters now, and discover the rest inside the Discord community.
showcase.bankDesc: The financial heart of Luna. Earn daily salaries, take loans, trade currencies, and unlock exclusive VIP benefits. Manage your Lunari and build your fortune in the Luna universe.
showcase.partnersDesc: Meet the creative minds behind Luna. Our partners are talented creators, designers, and game studios who have contributed their expertise to build this extraordinary fantasy universe.

features.title: Why Luna?
features.subtitle: Everything you need for an immersive roleplay experience.

lore.title: Deep Lore
lore.desc: Hundreds of years of history, wars, and legendary heroes woven into an expansive universe.

cards.title: Strategic Cards
cards.desc: A unique card game where strategy and timing matter more than raw power.

community.title: Active Community
community.desc: Join writers, gamers, and dreamers in building stories together on Discord.

cardsPage.subtitle: Explore the complete deck of Luna Fantasy - the strategic card game of the Luna universe. Filter by rarity and build your strategy.
cardsPage.whatDesc: Luna Fantasy is the official card game of the Luna universe. Created for the Luna Discord roleplay community, it combines strategy with the rich lore of our world.
cardsPage.howDesc: Luna Fantasy is a unique card game invented by us. Each player holds 5 cards. You must predict your opponent's moves. It's about strategy, not luck.

rules.rule1: Each player holds 5 cards (Common, Rare, Epic, Unique + 1 Random).
rules.rule2: The winner is usually the stronger card, but higher tier doesn't always guarantee a win blindly.
rules.rule3: A player must win 5 rounds to be the victor.
rules.rule4: You can use the Random Card as a substitute for any of your existing cards.

grandFantasyPage.subtitle: Explore the complete deck of Grand Fantasy - the ultimate strategic card battle of the Luna universe. Build your army across five rarities and claim victory.
grandFantasyPage.whatDesc: Grand Fantasy is the premier PvP card battle in the Luna universe. Two players assemble a team of 10 cards — 5 chosen from their own collection and 5 dealt randomly by the Jester — then clash in a series of strategic rounds with powerful modifiers that can turn the tide.
grandFantasyPage.howDesc: Challenge an opponent and pick one card from each rarity in your book: Common, Rare, Epic, Unique, and Legendary. The Jester adds one random card per rarity. Modifiers activate each round, adding twists like hidden cards, power boosts, and surprise reversals.

rules.rule1: Each player selects 5 cards (one per rarity: Common, Rare, Epic, Unique, Legendary) from their collection.
rules.rule2: The Jester deals 5 additional random cards (one per rarity) — giving each player 10 cards total.
rules.rule3: Cards battle head-to-head by attack power. The player who wins the most rounds wins the match.
rules.rule4: Modifiers activate each round — darkness, power surges, dragon fire, and more can change the outcome.
rules.rule5: The winner earns 15,000 Lunari. Special cards like Wolves and Dragons have unique abilities.

factionWarPage.subtitle: Collect faction trios and dominate the battlefield. Explore all 11 factions and their warriors in the Faction War card game.
factionWarPage.whatDesc: Faction War is a PvP card game where two players compete to collect faction trios. Built from 11 unique factions with over 250 character cards, every match is a strategic battle of drawing, discarding, and outsmarting your opponent.
factionWarPage.howDesc: Each player starts with 9 cards from a shared deck. On your turn, draw from the deck or take the field card, then manage your hand to form three matching faction trios before your opponent does.

rules.rule1: 2-player game (PvP or vs Bot). Costs 2 tickets to enter.
rules.rule2: Each player starts with 9 cards drawn from a shared faction deck.
rules.rule3: Draw phase: Draw from the deck OR take the field card (requires 2+ of that faction).
rules.rule4: Discard phase: If your hand exceeds 9 cards, discard from a chosen faction to the field.
rules.rule5: Win by collecting three faction trios (3+3+3). Bonus wins for dominant pairings (6+3) or a full faction sweep (9 same).

charactersPage.subtitle: Over 200 personalities woven into the story. Here are the key figures that shape the fate of Luna.
charactersPage.mastermindDesc: The one who pulls all the strings from the shadows. A strategic genius whose plans span decades. No one knows his true intentions, but all fear his influence.
charactersPage.ctaDesc: These are just the beginning. Over 200 unique characters await you in the Luna universe. Join our Discord to meet them all and create your own story.

storyPage.title: The Chronicles
storyPage.desc: The official lore, timeline, and the beginning of the Great Chaos War.

chapter1.label: Chapter One
chapter1.title: The World of Luna
chapter1.p1: There once existed a vast world upon a crescent-shaped lunar island known as Luna. All known and unknown beings lived there in peace and balance, untouched by fear or conflict.
chapter1.p2: Across the ages, Luna prospered. Its cities and strongholds stood firm, and its people lived securely within a stable order that knew nothing of tyranny or chaos.
chapter1.quote: "Peace was not fragile… we simply believed it was eternal."
chapter1.p3: Yet in secrecy, dark forces moved in silence, waiting for the moment to descend upon this tranquil world.

chapter2.label: Chapter Two
chapter2.title: Rise of the King of Chaos
chapter2.p1: Movarth emerged — a hybrid creature born of Orc and Ghoul blood, colossal in form and overwhelming in power. He drew his strength from the dark mastermind Shuran, the one who commanded the force of rampant chaos.
chapter2.p2: By Shuran’s command, the armies of chaos marched upon Lunvor, the capital of Luna. One by one, Luna’s knights fell before Movarth’s crushing might, and the great fortresses could not withstand the onslaught.
chapter2.quote: "When Movarth stood upon the battlefield, courage broke before steel."
chapter2.p3: From that day forward, Movarth was known as the King of Chaos, and a dark era descended upon Luna unlike anything it had ever known.

chapter3.label: Chapter Three
chapter3.title: The Two Masterminds
chapter3.p1: For hundreds of years, Luna remained under the rule of the King of Chaos, its people living in oppression and ruin — until visitors from Earth arrived, known as the Two Masterminds.
chapter3.p2: Though strangers to Luna, the masterminds chose to stay. They analyzed the chaos, rebuilt what had been destroyed, and devised precise plans to bring an end to Movarth and his armies.
chapter3.quote: "We were not born of this world… but we refused to let it burn."
chapter3.p3: The final battle erupted, and the Two Masterminds and their allies triumphed over the armies of chaos. Movarth was defeated by Luna’s champion, Boda Aban, and the conflict was forever recorded in history as the Great Chaos War.

storyPage.moreChaptersDesc: The story of Luna is vast and ever-expanding. Join our Discord community to discover new chapters as they unfold.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Luna.

q1.question: What is Luna?
q1.answer: Luna is a massive, integrated fantasy world built on Discord. It features over 200 unique characters, rich lore spanning centuries, and a unique strategic card game called Luna Fantasy.

q2.question: How do I join the community?
q2.answer: Simply click the "Join Discord" button to access our Discord server. Once there, you can create your character and start your journey in the Luna universe.

q3.question: Is Luna free to play?
q3.answer: Yes! Luna is completely free to join and play. Simply join our Discord community and start your adventure.

q4.question: How does the card game work?
q4.answer: Each player holds 5 cards of different rarities (Common, Rare, Epic, Unique + 1 Random). The game is about strategy and predicting your opponent's moves. Higher tier doesn't always guarantee victory!

q5.question: Can I create my own character?
q5.answer: Absolutely! Our community encourages creativity. You can create original characters that fit within the Luna universe and participate in ongoing storylines.

q6.question: What languages are supported?
q6.answer: Luna supports both Arabic and English. Our website and community welcome players from all backgrounds.

footer.desc: A premium roleplay experience on Discord. Join a community of writers, gamers, and dreamers.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.desc: Please read these terms carefully before using Luna.
termsPage.content: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Luna platform and its related services. By accessing or using Luna, you agree to be bound by these terms. Luna is a fantasy roleplay community built on Discord. All users must comply with Discord's Terms of Service in addition to these terms. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of any changes. Content created within Luna remains the intellectual property of its respective creators, while Luna retains the right to use such content within the platform. Users must be at least 13 years of age to participate. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms or community guidelines.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.desc: How we handle your data at Luna.
privacyPage.overviewContent:
Luna is a fantasy community built on Discord, consisting of Discord bots (Luna Butler, Luna Jester, Luna Sage, Luna Oracle), a website (lunarian.app), and related services. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding that data.

By using any Luna service, you agree to this policy. If you do not agree, please stop using our services and request data deletion.
privacyPage.dataCollectedContent:
We collect only the minimum data necessary to provide our services:

- Discord account information: user ID, username, display name, roles (provided by Discord when you interact with our bots or log into the website)
- In-game data: card collections, currency balances (Lunari), game statistics, level/XP progress, badge ownership, inventory items
- Transaction records: purchases, trades, daily rewards, game winnings
- Luna Sage AI interactions: messages sent in designated live chat channels where Sage is active, and messages sent directly to Sage via prefix commands
- Mastermind-set user facts: server administrators may store notes about users for personalization purposes
- Website session data: cookies for authentication and session management
- Payment information: processed securely through Stripe; card details are never stored on our servers
privacyPage.howWeUseContent:
Your data is used exclusively to provide Luna services:

- Discord user ID and roles: to identify you across our bots and website, enforce permissions, and personalize interactions
- In-game data: to maintain your progress, collections, and economy balance
- Transaction records: to provide transaction history and prevent abuse
- AI interactions: to generate contextual responses from Luna Sage (see Section 5)
- Cookies: to maintain your website login session
privacyPage.thirdPartyContent:
We use third-party services to operate Luna:

- Discord: our platform runs on Discord's infrastructure. Discord's own privacy policy applies to your use of Discord.
- AI services: Luna Sage uses third-party AI APIs to generate responses. Message content from designated channels may be sent to these services for processing. We do not send your Discord user ID to any AI provider.
- Stripe: processes payments securely. We never store your payment card details.
- We use industry-standard cloud infrastructure for hosting, databases, and content delivery. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest.

We do not sell your data to any third party. We do not use your data for advertising.
privacyPage.lunaSageContent:
Luna Sage is an AI assistant that operates in designated Discord channels. When Sage is active in a channel:

- Messages in that channel are temporarily held in memory (last 50 messages) to provide conversation context. This buffer is not permanently stored and resets when the bot restarts.
- When Sage responds (via prefix command or auto-join), recent messages are sent to a third-party AI service to generate a response. User IDs are not included in data sent to AI providers.
- Mastermind-set user facts: server administrators (Masterminds) may store facts about users that Sage references in conversation. These facts are stored in our database until a Mastermind removes them or you request deletion.
- Activity logs: Sage logs when it reacts to or joins conversations (trigger type, channel, brief response excerpt). These logs are automatically deleted after 30 days.

You can view what data Sage has about you by typing !sage mydata in any channel. You can request deletion of all your Sage data by typing !sage forget.
privacyPage.dataRetentionContent:
- In-game data (cards, currency, levels): retained as long as your account is active in the Luna server
- Transaction records: retained indefinitely for audit purposes
- Sage activity logs: automatically deleted after 30 days
- Sage conversation buffer: in-memory only, not permanently stored
- Sage user facts: retained until removed by a Mastermind or by your request
- Website session cookies: expire when you log out or after 30 days of inactivity
privacyPage.userRightsContent:
You have the right to:

- Access: view what data we store about you (use !sage mydata for Sage data, or contact us for other data)
- Deletion: request deletion of your data at any time (use !sage forget for Sage data, or contact us through our Discord server for complete account deletion)
- Correction: request correction of inaccurate data stored about you
- Portability: request a copy of your data in a readable format

To exercise these rights, contact us through the Luna Discord server or via the contact form on lunarian.app. We will respond to requests within 30 days.
privacyPage.securityContent:
We take reasonable measures to protect your data:

- Database connections are encrypted (TLS/SSL)
- Admin dashboard access is restricted to authorized Masterminds with CSRF protection and rate limiting
- Bot tokens and API keys are stored as environment variables, never in code
- All mutation endpoints require authentication and are audit-logged

No system is 100% secure. If you discover a vulnerability, please report it through our Discord server.
privacyPage.childrenContent: Luna services are available to users who meet Discord's minimum age requirement (13 years or the minimum age in your country). We do not knowingly collect data from users below this age. If you believe a child under the minimum age is using our services, please contact us.
privacyPage.changesContent: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use of Luna services after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPage.contactContent:
For privacy-related questions, data requests, or concerns:

- Discord server: Luna (primary contact method)
- Website: lunarian.app/contact

We aim to respond to all inquiries within 30 days.

refundPage.title: Refund Policy
refundPage.desc: Our policy on refunds and purchases.
refundPage.content: All purchases made through Luna's Bazaar using real currency (via Stripe) are generally final. Lunari credited to your account after a successful purchase is considered delivered. If you experience a technical issue where payment was processed but Lunari was not credited, please contact our support team on Discord within 7 days of the transaction. We will investigate and resolve the issue promptly. In-game purchases made with Lunari (such as luckboxes, stone boxes, and tickets) are non-refundable as the virtual items are delivered instantly. We reserve the right to issue refunds at our discretion in exceptional circumstances.

aboutPage.title: About Lunarian
aboutPage.subtitle: A fantasy universe born from two friends, a shared dream, and a deep love for storytelling.
aboutPage.originP1: Lunarian began as a late-night conversation between two friends — one from Kuwait, the other from Saudi Arabia. Both shared an obsession with fantasy worlds, epic lore, and the kind of stories that stay with you long after the last page. They asked themselves a simple question: what if they could build a world that others could actually live in?
aboutPage.originP2: What started as rough sketches of characters and hand-drawn maps on notebooks quickly turned into something bigger. They built Luna — a crescent-shaped lunar island with centuries of history, wars, heroes, and villains. But they didn't want it to sit in a document. They wanted it to breathe, to grow with real people inside it.
aboutPage.originQuote: "We didn't just want to tell a story. We wanted to build a world where others could write their own."
aboutPage.originP3: So they brought it to Discord. What began as a small roleplay server became a full-scale fantasy universe — complete with original card games, a living economy, over 200 characters, and a community of writers, gamers, and dreamers who shape the story every day.
aboutPage.whatP1: Lunarian is a fantasy universe built on Discord. It's a place where storytelling, strategy, and community come together. At its heart is Luna — a vast world with deep lore, original characters, and an economy that players interact with every day.
aboutPage.whatP2: Players collect cards, compete in strategic card games like Luna Fantasy and Grand Fantasy, earn and trade a currency called Lunari, and explore a lore that spans centuries of war, peace, and mystery. Everything is interconnected — the story, the games, the economy, and the community.

story.title: Deep Lore
story.desc: Centuries of history — from the Great Chaos War to the rise of the Two Masterminds. A living story that grows with the community.

cards.title: Strategic Card Games
cards.desc: Three original card games — Luna Fantasy, Grand Fantasy, and Faction War — where strategy and timing beat raw power.

economy.title: Living Economy
economy.desc: Earn Lunari, take loans, invest, trade cards, and visit merchants. A full economic system powered by the community.

community.title: Community-Driven
community.desc: Writers, gamers, artists, and dreamers building stories together. Luna is shaped by the people who live in it.

aboutPage.visionP1: Lunarian was never meant to be a product. It was built by two friends who simply wanted to create something they wished existed — a fantasy world that feels alive, that rewards creativity, and that belongs to the people inside it. That vision hasn't changed.
aboutPage.visionQuote: "Luna doesn't belong to us. It belongs to everyone who has ever written a story, played a card, or called it home."
aboutPage.ctaDesc: Luna is free, open, and always growing. Whether you're here for the lore, the games, or the community — there's a place for you.
